creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
We should verify FreeBSD on github.
See  https://help.github.com/articles/verifying-your-organization-s-domain/

This will require DNS changes (with a 7 day timeout so coordinate with cluster admin).

This has three effects: 
(a) we get a cool checkmark on github
(b) we get to see people's freebsd.org email on github
(c) everyone with a freebsd email on github will get a one-time email
